overview: This four-color Standard deck leverages mana acceleration and card advantage to outpace opponents. By combining ramp spells with resilient creatures, it establishes early board presence and scales into a dominant late-game state. The synergy between land development and value engines allows consistent pressure while maintaining interaction.
win_conditions: Establishing an unblockable board presence with ramped creatures
Generating continuous card advantage through value engines
Outlasting opponents with superior resource generation

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands
Low-cost creatures that apply immediate pressure

early_game: Play lands and ramp spells to accelerate mana base
Deploy early creatures to establish board presence
Hold up mana for interaction if opponent plays aggressively
mid_game: Cast signature value creatures and ramp sorceries
Use card draw to find answers to opponent's threats
Begin applying consistent pressure with developed board
late_game: Leverage excess mana for continuous value generation
Protect key engines with removal or evasion
Close out the game with overwhelming board state

key_cards.name: Badgermole Cub
key_cards.role: Early board presence and scaling threat
key_cards.notes: Deploy on curve to apply pressure; use its growth potential to outvalue early aggression.

key_cards.name: Quantum Riddler
key_cards.role: Tempo engine and card advantage source
key_cards.notes: Prioritize keeping it safe; use its abilities to draw cards or disrupt opponent's sequencing.

key_cards.name: Nature's Rhythm
key_cards.notes: Cast early to ramp into bigger threats; use the draw effect to find interaction or finishers.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize ramp spells before high-cost threats to maintain tempo
Hold up colored mana for interaction when opponent has sweepers or removal
Use card draw effects to refill hand before committing to large plays
Protect value engines until opponent's removal is exhausted

matchups.advice: Prioritize early blockers and ramp to stabilize quickly.
Apply pressure with multiple threats to force removal usage.
Disrupt their setup with interaction and maintain board presence.

common_threats: Value engines that outdraw the deck
